ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device (e.g., Xilinx, Altera) */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the device (e.g., Spartan, Virtex) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "device_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the device */,
  "pin_count" INTEGER /* Number of pins on the device */,
  "package_type" TEXT /* Type of package (e.g., BGA, QFP) */,
  "power_consumption" REAL /* Maximum power consumption of the device */,
  "clock_frequency" TEXT /* Maximum clock frequency supported by the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designs" (
  "design_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the design */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used in the design */,
  "design_name" TEXT /* Name of the design project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the design project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the design project was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the design project was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the design project (e.g., draft, in progress, completed) */,
  "complexity" TEXT /* Complexity level of the design project (e.g., simple, complex) */,
  "synthesis_tool" TEXT /* Tool used for synthesis (e.g., Vivado, Quartus) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_designs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_designs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, verification engineer, project manager) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., C_FAMILY, C_DATA_SIZE) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter (e.g., string, integer) */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the parameter */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the parameter (e.g., timing, power) */,
  "min_value" TEXT /* Minimum value that the parameter can take */,
  "max_value" TEXT /* Maximum value that the parameter can take */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter value (e.g., MHz, uW) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "design_parameters" (
  "design_parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design parameter */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design project */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value set for the parameter */,
  "set_date" TEXT /* Date when the parameter was set */,
  "set_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_parameters_set_by FOREIGN KEY ("set_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_parameters_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_parameters_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design project */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the version (e.g., draft, released) */,
  "synthesis_tool" TEXT /* Tool used for synthesis of this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_parameters" (
  "version_parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version parameter */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value set for the parameter */,
  "set_date" TEXT /* Date when the parameter was set */,
  "set_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_parameters_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_parameters_set_by FOREIGN KEY ("set_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_parameters_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design project */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., area, speed, power) */,
  "tool_version" TEXT /* Version of the tool used to generate the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_metrics" (
  "report_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report metric */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., area, speed, power) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric value (e.g., MHz, uW) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_metrics_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_history" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the search */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Text of the search query */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date the search was performed */,
  "results_count" INTEGER /* Number of results returned by the search query */,
  "search_type" TEXT /* Type of search (e.g., device, design, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during the session */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "design_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was added */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of the comment (e.g., question, suggestion, approval) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES design_comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_comments_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "design_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design project */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., VHDL, Verilog) */,
  "file_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_files_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_files_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date the revision was made */,
  "revision_comment" TEXT /* Comment describing the revision */,
  "revision_number" INTEGER /* Revision number (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  "revision_type" TEXT /* Type of the revision (e.g., minor, major) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_revisions_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES design_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborators" (
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaborator */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration (e.g., owner, contributor) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the collaborator (e.g., view, edit, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaborator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborators_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id")
)
